title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-1062
summary: Rakesh Umar Vaishya and co-accused Omkar Gupta were arrested in connection with recovery of 60 kg of ganja. They sought regular bail under Section 439 CrPC, arguing false implication, contradictions in prosecution case, and bail granted to co-accused Pran @ Shiv Kumar Baghel.
